page_metadata.biotools__summary: Analyzes images of cell colonies that emit a luminescent/fluorescent signal in the form of a luminescent halo around the colony. Automatically identifies both the colonies and their emitted luminescent halos and returns quantitative data on features
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Analyzes images of cell colonies that emit a luminescent/fluorescent signal in the form of a luminescent halo around the colony. Automatically identifies both the colonies and their emitted luminescent halos and returns quantitative data on features
